query:
UPDATE users
            SET
                failed_login_attempts = CASE
                    WHEN COALESCE(last_failed_at, '1970-01-01'::TIMESTAMP) < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
                    THEN 1
                    ELSE failed_login_attempts + 1
                END,
                last_failed_at = NOW(),
                lockout_until = CASE
                    WHEN (
                        CASE
                            WHEN COALESCE(last_failed_at, '1970-01-01'::TIMESTAMP) < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 minutes'
                            THEN 1
                            ELSE failed_login_attempts + 1
                        END
                    ) >= 5
                    THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '30 minutes'
                    ELSE lockout_until
                END
            WHERE id = $1
